calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Valerie Papale. Laura Gay Rauch was sworn and examined. The Court grants decree changing name to Laura Rauch. Decree signed in open court.
